title: Visual Interpretability of ColPali | Qdrant Multi-Vector Search
summary: Qdrant demonstrates visual interpretability for ColPali embeddings, which represent documents as 1,024 patch embeddings mapped to spatial locations. The system computes per-token similarity heatmaps overlaid on documents to show which regions match query terms, enabling interpretable multi-vector search and relevance debugging.
